primary.style: bold, geometric, slightly futuristic sans-serif with cut corners on the 'B', 'R', and 'C'. Features an outer cyan glow and solid white fill.

secondary.style: monospace, clean, highly legible terminal/code font.

elements.background_pattern: A strict rectangular grid spanning the entire composition. Intersections of horizontal and vertical lines are marked with glowing cyan dots.

character_mascot.position: top left and faintly mirrored on top right
character_mascot.description: A glowing, volumetric rendering of a stylized bear/animal head constructed out of what looks like white neon wireframe or glowing particles.
